personalInfo.name: Manouk van Draanen
personalInfo.title: Software Engineer
personalInfo.subTitle: Full-Stack Engineering
personalInfo.bio: Software Engineer with experience building web applications, integrations, and business-critical platforms. My background spans ServiceNow, .NET, and modern front-end development. I enjoy turning complex requirements into practical solutions that are reliable, scalable, and easy to use.
personalInfo.expertise: .NET Core & C#, Frontend Web Development, ServiceNow

projects.title: Fietsmaatjes Amsterdam Nieuw-Sloten
projects.description: A custom website built for a local volunteer organization that connects cycling volunteers with people who can no longer ride independently. Designed to be fast, easy to manage, and flexible enough to grow with the organization.

projects.title: Donnybap
projects.description: A modern landing page created for an Amsterdam pop-up food concept specializing in customizable Korean bibimbap bowls. Built with a focus on speed, simplicity, and mobile usability.

projects.title: Schengen Tracker
projects.description: A mobile app that helps travelers keep track of their Schengen stay allowance. It calculates days spent in the Schengen Area and helps users avoid accidentally exceeding visa limits.

skills.name: React & Next.js
skills.description: Building modern web applications with server components, routing, state management, and performance optimization.

skills.name: TypeScript
skills.description: Strong typing, reusable utility types, generics, and maintainable codebases.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS
skills.description: Responsive layouts, custom design systems, and utility-first styling.

skills.name: .NET Core & C#
skills.description: Building APIs, working with Entity Framework, LINQ, and clean application architecture.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.description: Express applications, backend utilities, asynchronous programming, and REST services.

skills.name: REST
skills.description: Designing, consuming, and integrating APIs between systems and services.

skills.name: Azure DevOps
skills.description: Source control, work item tracking, boards, and deployment pipelines.

skills.name: ServiceNow
skills.description: Custom applications, workflows, integrations, catalog development, and platform customization.

skills.name: Git / GitHub
skills.description: Version control, pull requests, branching strategies, releases, and collaboration workflows.

skills.name: Azure Services
skills.description: Working with Azure Functions, App Services, Key Vault, Cosmos DB, and related services.

skills.name: CI/CD Pipelines
skills.description: Automating builds, deployments, testing, and release processes.

experience.description: Working on a .NET-based platform that supports the ordering and delivery of telecommunications infrastructure and hardware between business partners.
achievements: Developed .NET applications that automate the ordering, validation, and tracking of hardware assets used in large-scale telecommunications projects.
Built and maintained integrations with external telecom partners to exchange data and process hardware orders accurately.
Improved application workflows and delivery processes, helping reduce delays and manual effort across the platform.

experience.description: Worked on ServiceNow implementations, integrations, and data modeling projects for enterprise clients.
achievements: Implemented and refined CSDM structures to improve visibility between business services and technical infrastructure.
Developed REST and SOAP integrations between ServiceNow and external enterprise systems.
Contributed to platform security improvements and access control configurations to support governance requirements.

experience.description: Built and maintained custom ServiceNow solutions that supported the delivery of telecommunications and digital services across the Netherlands.
achievements: Worked closely with business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable ServiceNow solutions that improved operational efficiency.
Developed workflow automation and provisioning logic for internet, telephony, and security-related services.
Provided technical guidance within a multidisciplinary team and contributed to platform improvements and long-term maintainability.

experience.description: Supported managed IT environments through infrastructure administration, troubleshooting, and automation.
achievements: Resolved infrastructure, networking, and end-user issues affecting business operations.
Created PowerShell scripts to automate recurring administrative tasks and reduce manual work.
Managed server, endpoint, and network environments while supporting complex technical escalations.

experience.description: Provided technical support, platform administration, and ServiceNow development within a managed services environment.
achievements: Resolved complex infrastructure, application, and user support issues across multiple client environments while maintaining high customer satisfaction.
Managed application changes, created RFCs, and coordinated system updates with stakeholders.
Helped implement a new ServiceNow platform, including custom workflows and process improvements to support IT service delivery.
Used PowerShell automation to improve efficiency and reduce repetitive administrative work.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Media & Entertainment Management
education.description: A business-focused degree with a strong creative foundation in media, film, and game production. Completed a specialized minor focused on music industry contract law.
